holdings.infoBox: DFGR is an equity ETF with a total of 438 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 7.56%, Prologis at 6.94%, Equinix at 5.21%, American Tower at 4.37%, and Simon Property Group at 3.56%.

overview.description: The Dimensional Global Real Estate ETF (DFGR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is actively managed to hold a diversified selection of US and foreign companies whose principal activities are engaged in the broad real estate sector, while focusing on REITs. Portfolio holdings are weighted by market capitalization. DFGR was launched on Dec 6, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.
